primary_accounting_issue: Détermination de l’éligibilité d’un contrat de location renouvelable tacitement ou à durée indéterminée à l’exemption de courte durée d’IFRS 16, en fonction de la détermination du lease term et de la période exécutoire du contrat.

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I applied the strict precedence rule by selecting IFRS 16 because it is the specific IFRS standard that governs lessee recognition, lease term determination, enforceable period, and the optional short-term lease exemption for leases, while the other documents do not govern that same lease accounting issue.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: Low uncertainty because the question is directly about lessee lease accounting and the short-term lease exemption, both expressly addressed in IFRS 16.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern the short-term lease exemption and the determination and reassessment of the lease term and enforceable period.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs define the alternative lessee model that applies when the short-term lease exemption is not used or is not available.

peripheral_authority.reason: These paragraphs address enforceable rights and contract duration in revenue contracts, which is topically related but not relevant for identifying peer lease accounting approaches under IFRS 16.
These paragraphs concern intangible asset useful lives and disclosures, which do not contribute to identifying lease accounting approaches for the short-term lease exemption.

treatment_families.family: Optional exemption model for leases treated as short-term leases
General lessee recognition and measurement model when the exemption is not applied

approaches.label: Short-term lease exemption
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 16 provides a distinct optional lessee model under which qualifying short-term leases are expensed rather than recognised on balance sheet.

approaches.label: Right-of-use model
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 16 requires recognition of a right-of-use asset and lease liability under the general lessee model when the short-term lease exemption is not applied.
